work.summary: Building production LLM systems — agentic workflows, RAG pipelines, and multi-agent architectures for financial and enterprise domains.
bullets: Built a financial document intelligence system for Master Facility Agreements and Sanction Letters using Docling extraction + semantic chunking (LangChain) to enable long-context retrieval for 100+ page documents.
Designed a 2×2 VectorDB retrieval architecture (Working Capital vs Long-Term Finance × MFA vs Sanction Letter) to isolate semantic neighborhoods and reduce embedding interference.
Implemented agentic orchestration using LangGraph to route multi-step workflows (classification → retrieval → synthesis) with deterministic control flow and error handling.
Integrated Text-to-SQL using Bedrock Agents to support hybrid structured + unstructured reasoning (contract clauses + financial tables).
Deployed on AWS (Lambda + Bedrock LLMs) with latency, cost, and output formatting optimizations.
Implemented MCP server tools in Databricks and deployed as an internal app, enabling secure tool integration for LLM-driven workflows.

Developed an AI-powered accelerator that analyzes product images and descriptions to deliver pricing intelligence, competitor benchmarking, product discovery, go-to-market recommendations, IP risk assessment, and AI-generated marketing content through a multi-agent architecture.

work.summary: Applied XAI and statistical modeling to supply chain optimization, plus multimodal AI for document processing.
bullets: Designed a safety stock optimization model (Z-score, AMC, lead time, SD), reducing inventory holding costs and improving reorder accuracy.
Applied Counterfactual Explanations (XAI) to RFQ classifications, identifying actionable parameter shifts that improved deal conversion rates.
Built a proof-of-concept with Gemini Pro Vision to extract structured data from scanned vendor invoices, streamlining accounts payable workflows.

work.summary: Delivered analytics and planning solutions within the SAP ecosystem, optimizing enterprise data pipelines and geospatial analytics.
bullets: Delivered analytics and planning solutions within SAP ecosystem, enhancing forecasting, reporting, and decision workflows.
Reduced processing time from days to minutes by optimizing data pipelines in SAP BPC.
Integrated spatial + business + financial data across SAP S4HANA, GIS, and Real Estate modules for geospatial analytics.

research.title: Explainable AI for Predicting Malware Infection
research.summary: ML model on 8.9M-device Microsoft Malware dataset with GDPR-compatible explainability for cybersecurity applications.
bullets: Trained ML model on Microsoft Malware dataset (8.9M devices) achieving ~66.7% accuracy and ~66.4% recall, aiding proactive mitigation of data breaches and financial risks.
Applied EBM, SHAP, LIME for interpretability, producing local + global explanations with uncertainty for regulatory + trust alignment (GDPR-compatible design).
Engineered features from 4.1GB (83-field) dataset, optimizing memory usage by ~50% via columnar transformations in Pandas/Polars.

research.summary: Built a multimodal price discovery agent with RAG + tool-calling for 100K+ SKUs.
bullets: Built multimodal price discovery agent using Gemini Pro Vision, achieving ~97% accuracy on internal test set.
Designed scalable RAG pipeline + VectorDB + tool-calling agent for 100K+ SKUs, reducing manual lookup effort by 50%.
Implemented fallback logic: queries VectorDB for known items and dynamically falls back to search APIs for unknown products.
Developed Selenium scrapers for product data acquisition and validation.
Added usage examples for f_regression() to improve documentation usability — PR #28104
Added usage examples for silhouette_score() to improve documentation usability — PR #28125
